compiled_state.title: Add confirmation_token_required and justification fields to external-dependencies-block.md contract
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Update plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md (created by story bec5-7f84) to formally document the two fields this story propagates into the External Dependencies block:

1. confirmation_token_required (boolean, optional, default false): Present on block entries where verification_command is omitted. When true, sprint's pause handshake requires the user to type a confirmation token and logs it to the ticket as an audit trail.
2. justification (string, required when verification_command is omitted): Non-empty rationale for why the verification_command was omitted. Required when confirmation_token_required is true.

These fields must be added to the schema Fields table and the Example payload in the contract doc. The contract is consumed by downstream stories 9c89-7d9f (preplanning) and 9e66-3e5d (sprint) which need to read these fields.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md: Add the two fields to the Fields table and add example values to the Example payload.

### TDD requirement
The existing check-contract-schemas.sh pre-commit hook validates contract docs for required structure (Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, Example sections). After adding the fields, the contract doc must pass the schema check. This task modifies existing structural tests (the schema validation) to pass with the new fields present.

Since this is an UPDATE task (behavior change to existing schema), we verify the contract schema validator accepts the updated doc.

### Exemption note
The contract doc is a non-executable markdown file. Per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5, tests target the structural boundary (schema validation). The check-contract-schemas.sh hook is the structural boundary test — verifying it passes with the updated doc is the appropriate test.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md contains confirmation_token_required field entry in Fields table
  Verify: grep -q 'confirmation_token_required' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md contains justification field entry in Fields table
  Verify: grep -q 'justification' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- [ ] Contract schema validation passes (check-contract-schemas.sh accepts the updated doc)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso check-contract-schemas.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] Both new fields have type, required/optional status, and description documented
  Verify: grep -A3 'confirmation_token_required' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md | grep -q 'boolean\|optional\|required'
- [ ] Example payload in contract doc includes confirmation_token_required and justification with representative values
  Verify: grep -A5 '\"confirmation_token_required\"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md | head -1 | grep -q 'true\|false'
